title: Implementing NICE guidance | NICE
text:
showing how you can use evidence to improve care and services.
Evidence summaries 
Helping healthcare professionals make decisions and support the development and updating of local formularies.
General practice - keep your practice up-to-date 
Information and links to key resources that will help you keep your practice up to date.
Patient decision aids 
Our library of patient decision aids (PDAs) help people decide on healthcare options. They give evidence-based information on the options available, along with likely outcomes, benefits, harms and uncertainties.
NICE guidance implementation toolkits To support health and care organisations in putting evidence-based recommendations into practice, we've developed a series of implementation toolkits. 
Browse our implementation toolkits Help implement NICE guidance Join our adoption and impact reference panel to give your advice on tools and resources as they're being developed. Help us shape the commissioning and delivery of safe, effective and cost-efficient care.
Apply to be a member Sign up for our newsletters and alerts Keeping you up-to-date with important developments at NICE.
